results.term: Hi. I'm a little stressed out at the moment over l...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: Hi. I'm a little stressed out at the moment over losing my job in the coming months.

results.term: The company I work for is winding down. i'm on the...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: The company I work for is winding down. i'm on the old side to be looking for a job and i'm likely going to have to accept a lower salary, a longer commute and a heavier workload. In other words, I have a job I love, close to where I live that is very manageable. I can't sleep and I'm insanely anxious all of the time.

results.term: I started looking for a job last week. I had a tra...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: I started looking for a job last week. I had a transition meeting today to pass on the little bit of my work that will be left to another person. I have 2 children; one who just started college this fall and another who is a junior in high school. my elderly mother lives with me also so I can't sell my house any time soon and move into something smaller and cheaper. I feel really trapped at the moment.

results.term: i have friends and family close by. i don't like t...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: i have friends and family close by. i don't like to burden people with my problems. I know i also don't adjust well to change and that doesn't help.

results.term: breaking issues down into groups is helpful and ma...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: breaking issues down into groups is helpful and may take away some of the enormity of everything.

results.term: I've always been reluctant to ask for help or favo...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: I've always been reluctant to ask for help or favors because i keep thinking there will always be a time down the road where i will need something more. it's helpful to have someone remind me that change isn't always a bad thing. thank you.

results.term: I'll talk to some friends to see if anyone has som...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: I'll talk to some friends to see if anyone has some good budget cutting tricks. I'll continue to look for a job and i'll try to calm down a little for now.

results.term: i am  aware of many things including how truly for...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: i am  aware of many things including how truly fortunate i am to have my family, friends and health. I really appreciate your kind words and calming suggestions.
